## Summary
Provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request and the problem they solve.

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update (changes to README, CONTRIBUTING, or comments)
- [ ] Other (please specify)

1. ...

## Screenshots/GIFs
If this change affects the UI or visual companion behavior, please provide screenshots or screen recordings showing the before/after behavior.

## Checklist
Before submitting this Pull Request, please ensure:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have verified that existing behavior is preserved and no regressions are introduced.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly if needed.
- [ ] My commits are structured, self-contained, and follow the commit guidelines.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally on the target operating system.
